
# AI Agent Development Guardrails – OctoCAT Supply Chain System

## Architecture Rules
- Frontend uses React + TypeScript (strict).
- Tailwind CSS only (no inline styles).

## UI/UX Rules
- Follow consistent design patterns across components
- Maintain responsive design for mobile and desktop
- Use semantic HTML elements for better structure
- Implement loading states and error handling UI

## Accessibility Rules
- Include proper ARIA labels and roles
- Ensure keyboard navigation support
- Maintain color contrast ratios (WCAG 2.1 AA)
- Provide alternative text for images and icons

## State & Logic
- Use React hooks for state management
- Implement proper error boundaries
- Follow single responsibility principle for components
- Use TypeScript interfaces for all data structures

## Backend Rules
- Implement RESTful API design principles
- Use proper HTTP status codes
- Validate all input data
- Implement proper authentication and authorization

## Testing Rules
- Write unit tests for all components
- Include integration tests for critical user flows
- Maintain minimum 80% code coverage
- Use Jest and React Testing Library for frontend tests
